zh.Tilsted, Thisted, Danmark: 丹麥迪斯泰德提爾斯泰德
zh.Nordentoft, Tilsted, Thisted, Denmark: 丹麥奧盧姆提爾斯泰德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ebbe Strangesen Bild於1284年出生在丹麥迪斯泰德時，他的父親Strange Esgesen Bild30歲，母親Ellen Henriksdatter Limbek30歲。他和Bege Buggesdatter至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1328年在丹麥享年45歲。

zh-hans.Tilsted, Thisted, Danmark: 丹麦迪斯泰德提爾斯泰德
zh-hans.Nordentoft, Tilsted, Thisted, Denmark: 丹麦奧盧姆提爾斯泰德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ebbe Strangesen Bild于1284年出生在丹麦迪斯泰德时，他的父亲Strange Esgesen Bild30岁，母亲Ellen Henriksdatter Limbek30岁。他和Bege Buggesdatter至少有7个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1328年在丹麦享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Erna, Inge, Irmgard, Johann, Udo, Volker.
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or other compound names with the same initial element, hild ‘strife, battle’.

English: from the Middle English female personal name Hild (of which Hilda is the Latin form), a short form of a compound name with the first element Hild-, e.g. ancient Germanic Hildigard or Old English Hildgȳth, from hild ‘strife, battle’. Compare Hilliard .

variants.name: Hildebrand
meanings: German, Swedish, and English: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hildebrand (Old Norse Hildibrandr), composed of the elements hild ‘battle’ + brand ‘sword, firebrand’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Hilden
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so called near Benrath.
English: habitational name from Hildenborough (Kent), from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + denn ‘pasture’.

variants.name: Hiltz
meanings: Americanized form of South German Hilz, a variant of Hild 1.

variants.name: Hilde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Arlys, Erik, Iver, Juel, Selmer.
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Hilde, found in two places; the first element is most likely related to Old Norse hjallr ‘terrace, ledge’, the second one is from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Hildman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eberhard, Otto.
Americanized form of German Hildmann: elaborated form of the personal name Hild .

nameMeanings.name: Ebbe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 19th‐century revival of an Old English female name, a contracted form of Eadburga, composed of ēad ‘prosperity’ + burg ‘fortress’. St Ebba the Elder ( d. 638 ) was the sister of Oswald , King of Northumbria, who founded a Benedictine abbey at Coldingham in Berwickshire; St Ebba the Younger ( d. c.870 ) was abbess there and was murdered by marauding Danes .

en.lifeSummary: When Ebbe Strangesen Bild was born in 1284, in Thisted, Denmark, his father, Strange Esgesen Bild, was 30 and his mother, Ellen Henriksdatter Limbek, was 30. He had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Bege Buggesdatter. He died about 1328, in Denmark, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ebbe Strangesen Bild est né en 1284, à Thisted, Danemark, son père, Strange Esgesen Bild, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ellen Henriksdatter Limbek, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Bege Buggesdatter. Il est décédé environ 1328, à Danemark, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ebbe Strangesen Bild 1284 in Thisted, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Strange Esgesen Bild 30 und seine Mutter Ellen Henriksdatter Limbek 30. Er hatte mit Bege Buggesdatter mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1328 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Dänemark.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ebbe Strangesen Bild è nato il nel 1284 nel Thisted, Danimarca, il suo padre, Strange Esgesen Bild, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Henriksdatter Limbek, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Bege Buggesdatter. Morì circa 1328, nel Danimarca, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.Nordentoft Thisted Danmark: デンマークスイステド

ja.Randers, Århus, Denmark: デンマークaルハスランダース
ja.lifeSummary: Ebbe Strangesen Bildが1284年にデンマークスイステドで生まれた時，父Strange Esgesen Bildは30歳，母Ellen Henriksdatter Limbekは30歳であった。彼はBege Buggesdatterとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1328年にデンマークで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ebbe Strangesen Bild(이)가 1284년 덴마크 스이스테드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Strange Esgesen Bild(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Henriksdatter Limbek(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Bege Buggesdatter(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1328년 덴마크에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ebbe Strangesen Bild nasceu em 1284, em Thisted, Dinamarca, seu pai, Strange Esgesen Bild, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Henriksdatter Limbek, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Bege Buggesdatter. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1328, em Dinamarca, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ebbe Strangesen Bild родился в 1284 г. в местности тистед, Дания, его отцу по имени Strange Esgesen Bild было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Henriksdatter Limbek, 30. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Bege Buggesdatter. Он умер около 1328 г. в местности Дания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ebbe Strangesen Bild nació en 1284, en Thisted, Dinamarca, su papá, Strange Esgesen Bild, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ellen Henriksdatter Limbek, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Bege Buggesdatter. Murió aproximadamente 1328, en Dinamarca, a la edad de 45 años.
